items.claim: Abdul Hussein is small for the 135-pound weight class at only 5'5".
items.quote: The only thing that I would say that could potentially be a negative for him at 135 pounds is this guy is small for this weight class. He's only 5'5, right?

items.claim: Abdul Hussein uses karate and taekwondo-esque light footwork, bouncing in and out of range and charging in with the backhand.
items.quote: Kind of karate taekwond doesque with the light footwork. Charges in with the backhand.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has nasty submission skills and is dangerous anywhere the fight goes.
items.quote: He's got nasty submission skills as well. That's the thing that Abdul brings to the table that I think is going to be very troubling for Cody Gibson here. Anywhere the fight goes, Abdul is very dangerous.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein's most recent victory 6 months ago was a violent finish against former UFC fighter Tyson Nam.
items.quote: And his most recent victory 6 months ago was against a former UFC guy in Tyson Nam to where he violently uh put him away.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein had a competitive fight and was able to take down Muhammad Mokaev earlier in their careers.
items.quote: even though Hussein lost that fight, it was rather competitive at at moments, right? We saw Abdul taking down Muhammad Makay.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is nearly 39 years of age and carries a 21-12 record.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's almost 39 years of age, you know, he's 21 and 12, when you look at the record and the age

items.claim: Cody Gibson was brutally starched early in the first round by Richie Long eight months ago.
items.quote: going out there and getting brutally starched early in the fight by a Richie Long um in in the very first round eight months ago.

items.claim: Cody Gibson will have the height and reach advantage and will look to keep Hussein off of him with footwork and front kicks.
items.quote: Gibson's going to be the longer rangier guy. He's going to look to keep Hussein off of him, dance around the octagon side, utilize footwork, front kicks up the middle

items.claim: Nurolo Aliev stands 5'10" with a 72-inch reach.
Nurolo Aliev features forward pressure, excellent wrestling, high-pace grappling control, and volume boxing.
items.quote: He's got the forward pressure. He's got excellent wrestling, very good control, and he puts you in a highpace blender type of fight... throwing volume boxing upstairs.
